name: I just hurt my back lifting a heavy box at work—what are my first steps?

mainEntity.name: I just hurt my back lifting a heavy box at work—what are my first steps?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report the injury to your supervisor immediately in writing and seek medical attention to document the incident. In Utah and Idaho, strict reporting deadlines apply—failing to notify your employer promptly can result in a denial of benefits.
